title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Himalaya Drug Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Himalaya Drug Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
